parameters.jsCode:
const state = $input.first().json;
const { cuts, index } = state;
const cut = cuts[index];
if (!cut) throw new Error(`index ${index} が範囲外 (total: ${cuts.length})`);

const { motion } = cut;
const imageFile = `cut_${String(index + 1).padStart(2, '0')}.png`;
const seed = Math.floor(Math.random() * 999999999999);

const wf = {
  '100': { inputs: { sigmas: '0.909375, 0.421875, 0.0' }, class_type: 'ManualSigmas' },
  '103': { inputs: { cfg: 1, model: ['207', 0], positive: ['107', 0], negative: ['107', 1] }, class_type: 'CFGGuider' },
  '107': { inputs: { frame_rate: 25, positive: ['121', 0], negative: ['110', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVConditioning' },
  '108': { inputs: { width: ['163', 0], height: ['163', 1], length: ['187', 0], batch_size: 1 }, class_type: 'EmptyLTXVLatentVideo' },
  '109': { inputs: { video_latent: ['161', 0], audio_latent: ['199', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVConcatAVLatent' },
  '110': { inputs: { text: '', clip: ['190', 0] }, class_type: 'CLIPTextEncode' },
  '113': { inputs: { noise: ['115', 0], guider: ['129', 0], sampler: ['137', 0], sigmas: ['206', 0], latent_image: ['109', 0] }, class_type: 'SamplerCustomAdvanced' },
  '114': { inputs: { noise_seed: seed }, class_type: 'RandomNoise' },
  '115': { inputs: { noise_seed: seed + 1 }, class_type: 'RandomNoise' },
  '116': { inputs: { av_latent: ['113', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVSeparateAVLatent' },
  '117': { inputs: { video_latent: ['160', 0], audio_latent: ['116', 1] }, class_type: 'LTXVConcatAVLatent' },
  '118': { inputs: { samples: ['116', 0], upscale_model: ['189', 0], vae: ['184', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVLatentUpsampler' },
  '119': { inputs: { noise: ['114', 0], guider: ['103', 0], sampler: ['138', 0], sigmas: ['100', 0], latent_image: ['117', 0] }, class_type: 'SamplerCustomAdvanced' },
  '121': { inputs: { text: motion, clip: ['190', 0] }, class_type: 'CLIPTextEncode' },
  '125': { inputs: { av_latent: ['119', 1] }, class_type: 'LTXVSeparateAVLatent' },
  '127': { inputs: { tile_size: 512, overlap: 64, temporal_size: 512, temporal_overlap: 64, samples: ['125', 0], vae: ['184', 0] }, class_type: 'VAEDecodeTiled' },
  '129': { inputs: { cfg: 1, model: ['207', 0], positive: ['107', 0], negative: ['107', 1] }, class_type: 'CFGGuider' },
  '137': { inputs: { sampler_name: 'euler_ancestral' }, class_type: 'KSamplerSelect' },
  '138': { inputs: { sampler_name: 'euler_ancestral' }, class_type: 'KSamplerSelect' },
  '140': { inputs: { frame_rate: 25, loop_count: 0, filename_prefix: 'LTX23-cut' + String(index + 1).padStart(2, '0'), format: 'video/h264-mp4', pix_fmt: 'yuv420p', crf: 19, save_metadata: false, trim_to_audio: false, pingpong: false, save_output: true, images: ['127', 0], audio: ['201', 0] }, class_type: 'VHS_VideoCombine' },
  '160': { inputs: { strength: 1, bypass: false, vae: ['184', 0], image: ['162', 0], latent: ['118', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVImgToVideoConditionOnly' },
  '161': { inputs: { strength: 0.6, bypass: false, vae: ['184', 0], image: ['162', 0], latent: ['108', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVImgToVideoConditionOnly' },
  '162': { inputs: { img_compression: 55, image: ['246', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVPreprocess' },
  '163': { inputs: { image: ['164', 0] }, class_type: 'GetImageSize' },
  '164': { inputs: { resize_type: 'scale by multiplier', 'resize_type.multiplier': 0.5, scale_method: 'area', input: ['165', 0] }, class_type: 'ResizeImageMaskNode' },
  '165': { inputs: { width: ['194', 0], height: ['195', 0], upscale_method: 'nearest-exact', keep_proportion: 'crop', pad_color: '0, 0, 0', crop_position: 'center', divisible_by: 32, device: 'gpu', image: ['167', 0] }, class_type: 'ImageResizeKJv2' },
  '167': { inputs: { image: imageFile }, class_type: 'LoadImage' },
  '184': { inputs: { vae_name: 'LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors' }, class_type: 'VAELoader' },
  '187': { inputs: { value: 97 }, class_type: 'INTConstant' },
  '189': { inputs: { model_name: 'ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors' }, class_type: 'LatentUpscaleModelLoader' },
  '190': { inputs: { clip_name1: 'gemma-3-12b-it-qat-UD-Q4_K_XL.gguf', clip_name2: 'ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors', type: 'ltxv' }, class_type: 'DualCLIPLoaderGGUF' },
  '194': { inputs: { value: 720 }, class_type: 'INTConstant' },
  '195': { inputs: { value: 1280 }, class_type: 'INTConstant' },
  '196': { inputs: { ckpt_name: 'LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors' }, class_type: 'LTXVAudioVAELoader' },
  '197': { inputs: { unet_name: 'ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf' }, class_type: 'UnetLoaderGGUF' },
  '199': { inputs: { frames_number: ['187', 0], frame_rate: 25, batch_size: 1, audio_vae: ['196', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVEmptyLatentAudio' },
  '201': { inputs: { samples: ['125', 1], audio_vae: ['196', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVAudioVAEDecode' },
  '206': { inputs: { steps: 6, max_shift: 2.05, base_shift: 0.95, stretch: true, terminal: 0.1, latent: ['109', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVScheduler' },
  '207': { inputs: { chunks: 4, dim_threshold: 4096, model: ['197', 0] }, class_type: 'LTXVChunkFeedForward' },
  '246': { inputs: { longer_edge: 1344, images: ['165', 0] }, class_type: 'ResizeImagesByLongerEdge' }
};

return [{ json: { cuts, index, workflow: wf } }];

const { cuts, index } = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { cuts, index: index + 1 } }];
